narrative: Hot US CPI reignites inflation fears and drives a dollar rally — DXY +0.34% as Treasury yields climb; USD/JPY firms to 157.59 on a 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage. AUD/JPY bilateral divergence (+1.114% spread) remains the dominant G8 theme as AUD 1W avg (+0.563%, n=4) outperforms JPY (-0.551%, n=7); gold higher +0.82%; equities -0.16%; VIX 18.0. Watch RBNZ Inflation Expectations at 03:00 UTC.
